zh.lifeSummary: 當John Darset於大約1302年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger43歲，母親Gorrana De Crepon64歲。他於1317年與Elizabeth Pierrepont在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1386年在英國多瑟特享年86歲。

zh-hans.Griffe, Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓
zh-hans.Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃里克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Darset于大约1302年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger43岁，母亲Gorrana De Crepon64岁。他于1317年与Elizabeth Pierrepont在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1386年在英国多瑟特享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Darcy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Darset was born about 1302, in Essex, England, his father, Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger, was 43 and his mother, Gorrana De Crepon, was 64. He married Elizabeth Pierrepont in 1317, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1386, in Dorset, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Darset est né environ 1302, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gorrana De Crepon, avait 64 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pierrepont en 1317, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1386, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Darset um 1302 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger 43 und seine Mutter Gorrana De Crepon 64. Er hat 1317 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pierrepont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1386 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Darset è nato il circa 1302 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gorrana De Crepon, aveva 64 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pierrepont nel 1317, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1386, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Darsetが約1302年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Aaron Dorset Fitz Rogerは43歳，母Gorrana De Creponは64歳であった。1317年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでElizabeth Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1386年にイギリスドールセトで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Darset(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gorrana De Crepon(은)는 64세였다. 그는 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Elizabeth Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1386년 영국 도르세트에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Darset nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gorrana De Crepon, tinha 64 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pierrepont em 1317, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1386, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Darset родился около 1302 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gorrana De Crepon, 64. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pierrepont в 1317 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1386 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

sm.about 1302–about 1386: e tusa o le 1302–e tusa o le 1386

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Darset nació aproximadamente 1302, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Aaron Dorset Fitz Roger, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gorrana De Crepon, tenía 64 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pierrepont en 1317, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1386, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
